title: Thai Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Thai stir fry dish made with rice noodles, vegetables, and a hint of nutty flavor.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shattering (bell peppers) and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the egyptian rice and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles, soy sauce, and chili flakes. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the nutty (walnuts) and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with stir (fish sauce) to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped nuts and scallions if desired.
Cook the egyptian rice according to package instructions.
In a wok or large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the stir (fish sauce) and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shattering (bell peppers) and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the soy sauce and chili flakes. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the egyptian rice and stir-fry for another minute.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped nuts and scallions if desired.
